workflows.title: Contact form → instant email reply + log
workflows.description: The simplest possible: webhook from your site contact form → AI generates a personalised acknowledgement reply → sends via Gmail → logs to a Google Sheet. 4 nodes.

workflows.title: Stripe payment → Sheet log + Slack
workflows.description: Every Stripe payment writes a row to a Sales Log sheet and pings #sales channel. The Day-2 challenge automation.

workflows.title: Gmail inbox → AI auto-label
workflows.description: Every new email gets AI-classified into 7 categories and the matching Gmail label is applied. Saves 30 min/day of inbox triage.

workflows.title: Calendar event → prep brief 2hrs before
workflows.description: Two hours before any calendar event with an external attendee, AI scrapes their domain and posts a one-line summary to Slack.

workflows.title: New social mention → Slack ping
workflows.description: Polls Twitter/X (and optional Instagram) for new mentions of your brand → Slack ping with sentiment label so you can engage in real-time.

workflows.title: Invoice email → forward + log to accounting sheet
workflows.description: Vendor invoice arrives via email → AI extracts vendor + amount + due date → row appended to Accounting Log → original PDF auto-filed in Drive.

workflows.title: Website form → simple CRM entry
workflows.description: Form submission → AI extracts company + role from email signature → row appended to a Leads sheet (basic CRM). No HubSpot needed.

workflows.title: Weekly Stripe revenue summary
workflows.description: Every Friday 17:00: aggregates this week's Stripe revenue + customer count + biggest sale → emails the founder a 4-line summary.

workflows.title: 30-day NPS pulse — single-question email
workflows.description: 30 days after every Stripe customer is created, send them a 1-question NPS email. Responses logged in a Sheet.

workflows.title: Meta-automation — daily health check on your other workflows
workflows.description: Every morning 7am: queries n8n API for executions of all your workflows in the past 24h → flags any with >5% failure rate → Slack ping. The starter version of automation-monitoring.
